3129080.name: Seek & Sail
3129080.description:
About Seek & Sail

Seek & Sail is a pirate-themed deck-building roguelike. Your deck is made up of sailors, each bringing their own actions into combat. Upgrade your crew, uncover unique relics, and face intense naval battles where timing is everything.

A Deck of Sailors

You don’t just play cards—you recruit sailors who evolve over the course of your journey. Turn green deckhands into seasoned specialists with unique professions, teach them new maneuvers, and build a crew capable of overcoming any challenge.

Battles Ruled by Time

Actions don’t cost mana or energy. They cost time. Strike fast to act before your enemies, or take the risk with powerful moves that take longer to execute. Every decision can change the tide of battle.

Strategy and Synergies

Set your foes ablaze, spread fear, or harness blessings and curses to tip the balance in your favor. Manage your armor, master unusual maneuvers, and combine effects to create unique synergies with every action.

The Sea as Your Board

Sail through archipelagos full of dangers and choose your own routes. Manage supplies, visit taverns and shipyards, face unspeakable enemies, and always chart your own course. Every map offers new risks and opportunities.

A Different Voyage Every Run

No two journeys are the same: new sailors, trinkets, and routes make every run unique. Defeat isn’t the end—each attempt is a chance to try new strategies and discover fresh combinations.

A Story of Gods and Fate

You’re no ordinary pirate—you are chosen by the goddess Myrla. Even if your ship sinks, you will always return: your mission is eternal, and fulfilling it is your destiny. Unravel the mysteries of the seas of Seek & Sail and meet unforgettable characters along the way.
3129080.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
